name: Arachne Gorgon
description: Arachne Gorgon was the head of Arachnophobia who conspired to replace Death Weapon Meister Academy's position as a world power using madness with her in charge. She was also the eldest of the Gorgon Sisters, a former associate of both Death and Eibon of some sort, and considered the darkest blemish in the history of the Witch Order.

name: Bu-Ling Huang
description: **Height:** 138 cm (4'6") She is the fourth Mew Mew to be introduced and her DNA is merged with a Golden Lion Tamarin. Bu-Ling likes doing acrobatics and is very playful. The other Mew Mews agree that her monkey DNA is a perfect match for her personality, as she is full of energy and loves having fun – to the point where Mint considers her very immature. She is also the most hyperactive member of the team, even more-so than Ichigo. But she can be serious at times. (Source: Tokyo Mew Mew Wiki)

name: Gillian
description: Gillian is an orphan from the Grand Valley orphanage. She was transferred to the Goldy Pond hunting ground as potential prey, where she witnessed the death of her beloved sister by the hands of the Poachers. Determined for vengeance, Gillian joined the Goldy Pond Resistance, where she ended up in charge of the provisions. Gillian is a high-spirited and outgoing teenage girl, which thus made her stood out from the rest of the members of the Goldy Pond Resistance, whom are mostly serious in nature

name: Henry VI
description: Henry VI is the head of the House of Lancaster. A devout Christian who hates war and killing. He yearns to be a shepherd and meets Richard III in the forest, and they are drawn to each other without knowing each other's true identities. Henry VI is married to Margaret, and he is the father of Edward of Lancaster. Henry is most well-known as a cowardly man. However, this cowardice is mistaken as he hates war and therefore will not lead his armies, which leads his wife, Margaret, to do so for him.

description: **Height:** 145 cm Hiyori's childhood friend and classmate. She works at a fly fishing shop her family owns. Her father wanted to name her 'Koi' using the kanji for the variety of fish due to his obsession with fishing, but her mother decided to use the kanji for "love"... although they share the same pronunciation.

name: Kureha
description: Doctor Kureha is the sole remaining doctor on Drum Island. Because of her eccentric treatment of patients (whom she will readily injure if they do not follow her orders) she also displays abnormal fighting abilities and strength (punching through a brick wall several meters thick), along with her reclusive nature, she is often called a "witch." However, she is a legitimate practitioner of medicine, and has kept herself healthy and fit at nearly 140 years old.
